title: Cuneiform Tablet #0149: Achaemenid Divinatory
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Achaemenid period — a divinatory document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Achaemenid period — a divinatory document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Achaemenid period. Divinatory document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records divinatory matters typical of Achaemenid period administrative or literary practice.
